description_long: This chair features a striking mid-century modern design with a solid wooden frame and angular, sculptural legs that create a dynamic silhouette. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned and upholstered in a rich, brown leather or leather-like material, providing both comfort and a touch of luxury. The armrests are integrated into the frame, following the same angular motif and offering sturdy support. The backrest is slightly reclined, enhancing ergonomic comfort for lounging. The rear view reveals vertical wooden slats supporting the back cushion, adding both structural integrity and visual interest. The overall craftsmanship and material choice suggest a high-quality piece suitable for stylish urban interiors.
description: A mid-century modern chair with a sculpted wooden frame, brown leather cushions, and angular armrests, offering both comfort and style.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the angular wooden frame, armrest, and thick brown leather cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view showing vertical wooden slats supporting the backrest and the full width of the back cushion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angular frame and armrest, with clear visibility of the seat and backrest contours.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, cushioned seat and backrest, with armrests framing the chair.
